sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1
items.html: The coarseness of phase two of the direct light is called distancing, because it chooses the light of Hassadim and detaches itself from receiving the light of Hochma. Also, after the restriction there is distancing from Hochma in phase four, too, because all the restriction and screen in it pertain to the light of Hochma. (Part 3, Chapter 1, item 4)
